title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 87.470 - Funeral expenses
text:
87.470.  Funeral expenses. — Whenever an active or retired fireman shall die, as aforesaid, the board of trustees may appropriate a sum not exceeding two hundred dollars for funeral expenses, to be paid out of the pension fund and may expend a sum not exceeding fifty dollars, to be drawn from the pension fund, for the expenses of the attendance of the firemen at said funeral.
(RSMo 1939 § 9542) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 8977; 1919 § 9078; 1909 § 9903
